ab: Na tunma-aq asu muntaluqan ta?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Na tunlehle saak muntaluqan.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Na tunma-aq nepa munpa-i-ihu-an ta?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Tan-anak nepa munpa-i-ihu-an ta.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Na tunma-aq asu kis munPunghuu ta?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Na tunkusbabai saak is munPunghuu ta.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Na tunma-aq asu kis munPunghuu ta?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Na tunqatu saak is munPunghuu ta.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Na tunma-aq asu kis munlumaq in?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Na tunlehlemuhiav saak kis munlumaq in.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Tunma-aq a Tanivu kis munpasnanava-an ta?
en: How does Tanivu go to school?

ab: Tunlehlesapuz a Tanivu kis munpasnanava-an.
en: Tanivu goes to school by train.

ab: Tunma-aq a Manias is munhaan udidinunan ta?
en: How does Manias go to church?

ab: Tuntonton a Manias is munhaan udidinunan ta.
en: Manias  goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Tunlehlemuhiav asu kis munpasnanava-an ta?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Ni-i, tunlehlebunun saak is munpasnanava-an ta.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Tuntonton asu kis munpasnanava-an ta?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Uu, tuntonton saak is munpasnanava-an ta.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Tunlehlehquvias asu kis munTakau ta?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Uu, tunlehlequvias saak is munTakau ta.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Duuq tunlehlesapuz nait tunkusbabai asu kis munhaan Pusung ta?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Tunkusbabai saak, mopa sia kis tunkusbabai ka mataliskang i tunlehlesapuz tun.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Duuq tunlehlebunun nait tunlehle asu kis munhaan udidinunan ta?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Tunlehle saak is munhaan udidinunan ta, mopa sia kis tunlehle ka kamamadozung i tunlehlehbunun tun.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Meshuan su-u lumaq i babalivan tu dangi-an?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Ni-i, kadadauk saak tuntontondengaz munhaan babalivan ta.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Duuq meshuan a sasatu-an pinunhahaqil i pasnanava-an ta?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Meshuan, maqtu tan-anak mun-ita.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Duuq meshuan a kakonanqesing i papandu-an ta?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Mesnapapandu-an ta ka tan-anak ang a na heza tu himatektek maqtu tonadiip.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
